message:
chore(gitignore): exclude meta-skill workspace and linter output

Add entries to prevent committing local runtime state:

- .ms/ - Meta-skill local workspace directory containing:
  - archive/ - Local skill archive storage
  - config.toml - User-specific workspace configuration
  - index/ - Tantivy search index (binary, regenerated at runtime)
  - proposals/ - Work-in-progress proposal drafts
  - tombstones/ - Soft-delete markers for sync state

- clippy_output.json - Ephemeral linter diagnostic output

These files are machine-specific runtime state that should not be
shared across clones. The .ms/ directory is analogous to node_modules/
or target/ - it contains generated artifacts that are recreated by
`ms init` and `ms index`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -76,5 +76,11 @@ __pycache__/
 .ms_cache/
 .ms_state/
 
+# Meta-skill local workspace (runtime state, indexes, proposals)
+.ms/
+
 # Local user modifications (segregated from upstream)
 local_skills/
+
+# Linter output
+clippy_output.json
